summary: Complete testing of AI Electoral Assistant feature. Backend 18/18 tests passed. Frontend UI verified with chat working, quick actions functional, and AI providing contextual responses with real campaign data.

issues: Non-blocking console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render (existing issue from previous iteration)

passed_tests: POST /api/ai/chat responds with contextualized analysis
POST /api/ai/chat with session_id maintains conversation context
POST /api/ai/chat with financial questions returns relevant data
POST /api/ai/chat with compliance questions returns TSE-related info
POST /api/ai/chat requires authentication (401/403 without token)
POST /api/ai/chat handles empty messages
GET /api/ai/chat/history returns message list with session_id
GET /api/ai/chat/history with limit parameter works
GET /api/ai/chat/history requires authentication
DELETE /api/ai/chat/history clears history successfully
DELETE /api/ai/chat/history verifies history is empty after clear
POST /api/ai/analyze-expenses returns expense analysis
POST /api/ai/analyze-expenses requires authentication
POST /api/ai/check-compliance returns compliance report
POST /api/ai/check-compliance requires authentication
GET /api/ai/tse-rules returns TSE electoral rules
Chat history persistence - messages saved after chat
Frontend Assistente IA page loads correctly
Frontend chat input and send button visible and functional
Frontend quick actions (4 buttons) all visible and clickable
Frontend quick action 'Resumo financeiro' triggers AI response
Frontend quick action 'Verificar conformidade' triggers AI response
Frontend quick action 'Analisar despesas' triggers AI response
Frontend quick action 'Documentos pendentes' triggers AI response
Menu sidebar shows Assistente IA with 'Novo' highlight badge
AI responses contain actual campaign data (R$ values, pending items)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from user alan.garcia@teste.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Assistant feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) POST /api/ai/chat accepts {message, session_id?} and returns {response, session_id, alerts[]}. 2) GPT-5.2 integration via Emergent LLM Key working correctly. 3) AI has access to campaign data (revenues, expenses, contracts) and provides personalized responses. 4) Chat history persisted in MongoDB chat_history collection. 5) Quick actions map to predefined prompts. 6) Frontend shows alert badges for pending expenses and incomplete documentation.

features_verified.ai_chat_endpoint: Working - POST /api/ai/chat returns contextualized AI response
features_verified.frontend_assistente_page: Working - Chat UI loads with input, send button, quick actions
features_verified.gpt_5_2_integration: Working - Real AI responses with campaign context

ai_assistant_capabilities.financial_summary: Provides total revenues, expenses, balance, pending payments
ai_assistant_capabilities.compliance_check: Analyzes contracts and expenses against TSE rules
ai_assistant_capabilities.expense_analysis: Groups expenses by category with optimization suggestions
ai_assistant_capabilities.contextual_awareness: AI receives campaign data including all financial records and contracts
